INNOVATE. INCUBATE CENTRE FOR INNOVATION THE LAUNCHPAD FOR STUDENT INNOVATORS Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation is a hub for students from different streams of specialization to come together to collectively build products through active collaboration and creative thinking using emerging technologies. With the state of art facilities and excellent mentorship, we are excited about nurturing young innovators who can push the boundaries of innovation and make a great impact in the the world. Who knows! We may well be nurturing the next biggest innovator! 25+ SUMMER INTERNSHIPS IN IIT, NIT, CSIR 9 STARTUPS ACCELERATED THROUGH IGNITE 18 CoEs ACROSS INDUSTRY VERTICALS TO FOSTER INNOVATION 100+ HACKATHON WINS IN 1 YEAR LEADERSHIP Dr.Maheswari Raja Dean – Innovation Know more INNOVATION ADVISORY BOARD In order to be successful in our mission and to create a top-notch innovative ecosystem at Sri Eshwar, we actively consult and engage with the following Advisory board members from prestigious institutions. Their periodic guidance and help is valuable to us and our students. Mr.Jaiber John Director, Revobots AI Inc, Former Senior Software Architect, Intel Dr.Kannan Moudgalya Head of Application Software Cell and head of the Centre for Distance Engineering Education Program at IIT Bombay VISION To cultivate a dynamic ecosystem where ideas flourish, technologies advance, and inter disciplinary collaboration thrives for empowering future engineers by promoting innovations, problem solving, sustainable solutions to the real world challenges. MISSION To serve as a platform for innovation by providing state of the art facilities, resources, mentorship, and a collaborative environment where students and researchers can explore, develop, and implement cutting edge technologies. Our mission is to empower future engineers and innovators to create sustainable, impactful solutions, nurturing a culture of creativity and interdisciplinary collaboration. CENTRES OF EXCELLENCE Centres of Excellence(CoE) provides a platform for all department students from 1st year onwards, to gain knowledge on emerging technologies of their choice. Using the skills and knowledge gained here, students form teams with like-minded peers, and solve real world problems, develop products, publish papers, obtain international certifications, participate in Hackathons, bag internship opportunities. CoEs actively involve industry professionals for knowledge sharing and product guidance. Today companies are moving towards skill-based hiring, and CoEs serve as an excellent platform for students to become highly skilled, specialized and certified in their areas of interest and get placed in the companies that match their interest. In short, CoEs is a multi-disciplinary platform for students to stay ahead of the game! Centre of Excellence in Artificial Intelligence and Robotics Centre of Excellence in Data Science Centre of Excellence in Gen AI Centre of Excellence in Full Stack & App Development Centre of Excellence in Cloud Computing Centre of Excellence in Business Analytics Centre of Excellence in Cyber Security Centre of Excellence in Gaming and Animation Centre of Excellence in Augmented Reality and Virtual Reality Centre of Excellence in System on chip Centre of Excellence in Embedded and IOT Centre of Excellence in Drone Technologies Centre of Excellence in Networking Centre of Excellence in Electronic Design and Automation Centre of Excellence in Robotics and Industrial Automation Centre of Excellence in 3D Printing and Reverse Engineering Centre of Excellence in E-Vehicles Centre of Excellence in Graphics and Design INSTITUTION INNOVATION COUNCIL (IIC)​ The Institution Innovation Council (IIC) is an initiative by the Ministry of Education to systematically foster a culture of innovation and startup ecosystem into educational institutions. IIC’s role is to engage students and faculty in innovation and entrepreneurship related activities such as ideation, problem solving, proof of concept development, design thinking, IPR, project handling and management at pre-incubation and incubation stage, etc. In order to foster innovative culture and start-up ecosystem at Sri Eshwar, IIC activities such as projects, workshops, hackathons, ideation and brainstorming sessions are carried out. IIC provides a way for students and faculty members to further upskill and empower themselves with innovative thinking and entrepreneurship skills. KNOW MORE HACKATHONS Hackathons are an integral part of the innovation ecosystem at Sri Eshwar. These exciting events bring together a diverse set of students, to tackle a specific challenge or develop a new product with certain specified themes within a compressed time frame. By participating in hackathons, students gain tremendous exposure, networking opportunities with peers, new perspectives to solve problems, mentorship from senior industry professionals to fine tune their ideas and design, internship opportunities and even early placement opportunities. At Sri Eshwar, winning hackathons has become a habit! In fact it is in the DNA of Eshwarites! Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Vulnheist Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Hacksmithsv2 Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Black Squad Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Runner up Hack Summit 2024 Presented By Temenos II & III Year EEE Students Runner Up with 50,000 Cash Reward Decentralized Solar Energy Generation Hackathon III Year EEE Students Winners with Cash Rewards Anoka Ideathon 2024 Team ECE (II & III) Runner Up With Cash Reward Cellbot Healthcare Jam 2024 Team Drastic Innovators Standing first among 70 Teams with Cash Reward Hackfest2k24 3rd Year AI&DS Students Grabbed 3rd Place Standing out of 200+ teams IIT's Mint Hackathon Tech Mavericks Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states IIT's Mint Hackathon Team Weavers Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states The Future AI Tech Hackathon 2024 Mohamed Abubakker S & Sanjai L Secured 2nd Runner Up with Cash Reward Idea Ignite Hackthon 3rd Year CSE Students Secured 2nd Position among 2340 Participants Ninjacart AgriTech Hackathon 2024 Team Eshwarites Won cash prize of Rs. 50,000/- UNESCO-India-Africa Hackathon 2022 N.Sudarsan, AI&DS Won cash prize of Rs. 3,00,000/- National Level Hackathon Team ECE 6th Position among 250+ Clans IEEE - PROJECT EXPO 2024 4 Member Team Won 2nd Prize with Cash award BOOTCAMP (Phase I) INTERNSHIPS In order to give our students a holistic learning experience, we are committed to ensuring our students get the best internship opportunities. We are proud of Eshwarites who shine across the country, with their internships in prestigious institutions including IIT Bombay, CSIR etc. These internships begin as early as second year! PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT A thirst for challenges along with a product mindset is deeply ingrained in Eshwarites. We are proud to showcase some products built from scratch through teamwork and innovative spirit. These products are solutions for real-word problems that have made life easy. Eshwarites never stop their inquisitive thinking and are always looking for the next problem to solve. IGNITE - STARTUP ACCELERATOR GET READY TO TURN YOUR IDEA INTO A MARKETABLE PRODUCT. The state-of-the-art facilities of Ignite, creates an exciting ecosystem for students to collaborate using prototyping labs and a collaborative workspace. Ignite, staying true to its name is the birthplace of many start-ups. The first few years in the life of a start-up is crucial. At Sri Eshwar, we give students the experience of how to convert an idea to a finished product by mentoring them through structured processes, conducting bootcamps and providing the infrastructure required to build the product. We also provide financial support if required, to support the launch of the product. Once the startup is stable and mature,, the young entrepreneurs fly off into their own offices and grow the business further. Sri Eshwar has been the birthplace of many such young entrepreneurs. ENTREPRENEURSHIP Here’s a sneak peak of some Eshwarites who are now flying high as successful entrepreneurs. SKILL DEVELOPMENT Sri Eshwar not only nurtures successful students but also plays a vital role in uplifting the skill levels of the people in the society and upgrading the economy as a whole. At Sri Eshwar, we empower aspiring entrepreneurs with the skills required to establish their businesses. Special skill building programs are conducted for women entrepreneurs to enable them to set up small businesses to support themselves and their families. Sri Eshwar is dedicated to uplifting women of nearby localities by training them with the necessary skills and empowering them to lead their lives as successful entrepreneurs. Through grants received and seed funds sponsored by the Institution, WEDP programs (Women Entrepreneurship Development Programs) are conducted by Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation as a way to uplift those women around us.
